title: CRISIS TEXT LINE - 211info
text: CRISIS TEXT LINE CRISIS TEXT LINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides crisis support via text message, WhatsApp, and webchat. Texters are connected with live, trained crisis counselors. The Crisis Text Line is anonymous, and any information shared with a counselor remains confidential. Volunteer opportunities are available. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (443) 787-6778 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers WhatsApp English (443) 787-6778 WhatsApp Español (442) 298-3263 Text Short Code 741741 Text the word HOME or HOLA Crisis Text Line Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Text for assistance. It usually takes no more than five minutes to connect with a counselor. Visit website for information on how to become a volunteer crisis counselor. FEES: AT&T, T-Mobile, Sprint, and Verizon customers: texts to short code are free Other carriers: standard text message rates apply DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: General Crisis Intervention Hotlines If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
